content.json:
## Vaikora AI Agent Behavioral Signals

This workbook visualizes AI agent behavioral data ingested from Vaikora into Microsoft Sentinel. Use it to monitor agent activity, detect anomalies, and investigate policy violations.

parameters.name: AgentId
parameters.label: Agent ID
parameters.query: Vaikora_AgentSignals_CL | summarize by agent_id_s | project value=agent_id_s, label=agent_id_s

content.query:
Vaikora_AgentSignals_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where agent_id_s == '{AgentId}' or '{AgentId}' == 'value::all'
| summarize
    TotalActions = count(),
    BlockedActions = countif(policy_decision_s == 'block'),
    Anomalies = countif(is_anomaly_b == true),
    HighRisk = countif(risk_score_d >= 75),
    CriticalSeverity = countif(severity_s == 'critical')
| project TotalActions, BlockedActions, Anomalies, HighRisk, CriticalSeverity
content.title: Signal Overview

content.query:
Vaikora_AgentSignals_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where agent_id_s == '{AgentId}' or '{AgentId}' == 'value::all'
| summarize
    TotalActions = count(),
    Blocked = countif(policy_decision_s == 'block'),
    Anomalies = countif(is_anomaly_b == true)
  by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Agent Actions Over Time

content.query:
Vaikora_AgentSignals_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where agent_id_s == '{AgentId}' or '{AgentId}' == 'value::all'
| summarize Count = count() by severity_s
| order by Count desc
content.title: Actions by Severity

content.query:
Vaikora_AgentSignals_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where agent_id_s == '{AgentId}' or '{AgentId}' == 'value::all'
| summarize Count = count() by policy_decision_s
| order by Count desc
content.title: Actions by Policy Decision

content.query:
Vaikora_AgentSignals_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where agent_id_s == '{AgentId}' or '{AgentId}' == 'value::all'
| where is_anomaly_b == true
| summarize Count = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Anomalies Over Time

content.query:
Vaikora_AgentSignals_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where agent_id_s == '{AgentId}' or '{AgentId}' == 'value::all'
| where risk_score_d >= 75 or severity_s in ('high', 'critical')
| project TimeGenerated, agent_id_s, action_type_s, severity_s, risk_score_d, anomaly_score_d, policy_decision_s, status_s, resource_type_s, anomaly_reason_s
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Recent High-Risk Actions (top 50)

content.query:
Vaikora_AgentSignals_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where agent_id_s == '{AgentId}' or '{AgentId}' == 'value::all'
| where policy_decision_s == 'block'
| summarize
    ViolationCount = count(),
    MaxRiskScore = max(risk_score_d),
    Actions = make_set(action_type_s),
    Resources = make_set(resource_type_s),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)
  by AgentId = agent_id_s, PolicyId = policy_id_s
| extend ActionList = strcat_array(Actions, ', '), ResourceList = strcat_array(Resources, ', ')
| project AgentId, PolicyId, ViolationCount, MaxRiskScore, ActionList, ResourceList, LastSeen
| order by ViolationCount desc
content.title: Policy Violations by Agent and Policy
